questionHtml:
What is a result of crossing over in meiosis?

A.  Gene linkage

B.  Non-disjunction

C.  Haploid cells

D.  Variation in gametes

meta.title: What is a result of crossing over in meiosis? A. Gene linkage B. Non-disjunction C. Haploid cells D. Variation in gametes
breadcrumbLabels: D2.1.11. Meiosis as a source of variation
